calm.$description: easing calm — accessibility: soft onset for long/involuntary motion

prism3.note: no DTCG type for springs yet; provide a platform transform downstream
no DTCG type for springs yet; provide a platform transform downstream
no DTCG type for springs yet; provide a platform transform downstream

default.$description: motion default — standard in-place transition (normal + standard)

enter.$description: motion enter — entrance — element settles in (normal + enter)

exit.$description: motion exit — exit — element accelerates out (fast + exit)

emphasized.$description: motion emphasized — expressive / hero moment (moderate + emphasized)

width.$description: focus ring width — 2px (WCAG 2.4.13 floor; 3px for extra clarity)

offset.$description: focus ring offset — 2px (separates ring from the element edge)

offset-field.$description: focus ring offset, form fields — 0px (ring hugs the field; Primer)

style.$description: focus ring style — solid (dashed/dotted fail at small sizes)

decisions: primary anchor (h285) pinned exactly at step 550
action colour is decoupled: uses palette 'accent', NOT the primary brand palette — explicit brand decision
danger: primary hue 285 is NOT red → carved a dedicated danger red at hue 27
dimension axis: 4px grid, 8px space rhythm, density 'compact' (drives component sizes), radius scale 2 (baseMd 4px)
motion: tempo 'snappy' scales the duration ramp; easing roles + springs + composite transitions generated; reduce-motion variants derived (informational preserved, vestibular → 0)
disabled: 'accessible' — disabled text/icon/border clears 3:1 on the floor (legible, contrast-preserving; the field-rare default). Set disabledStrategy:'conventional' for the sub-AA exempt look.
light primary surface is NON-default (neutral.50) — CONFIRM this is the page colour; the contrast floor moves with it
